    • Oriented Drill Cores
    • Plotting
    • Orientation Plots
    • Orientation Plots with ggplot
    • Statistics
    • Statistics on the Sphere
    • Regression on the Sphere
    • Faults and Stress
    • Faults and Paleostress
    • Mohr Circle
    • Other
    • Strain and Vorticity Analysis
    • Deformation and Velocity Gradient Tensor

Subsetting StraboSpot Projects

Source: R/import.R
subset.strabo.Rd

Returns a subset from "strabo" objects which meet conditions.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'strabo'
subset(x, ..., ds = c("data", "spots", "tags"))

Arguments

x

object of class "strabo"

...

arguments to be passed to subset()

ds

character. Dataset that should be the base for subsetting. One of "data" (the default), "spots", or "tags".

Value

An object of class "strabo" containing just the selected rows and columns of "x".

See also

subset()

Other strabo: strabo

Examples

subset(strabo_prj, strabo_prj$data$quality > 3)
#> $data
#>                                        id dip_direction   dip strike plunge
#>                                    <char>         <num> <num>  <num>  <num>
#>   1: d951938c-6bee-4ce4-bee7-6cf17693a090           332    87    242      8
#>   2: 4a0aba4f-4707-4852-9811-f8457fd226e7           337    89    247      4
#>   3: 86c34f8d-b277-4a27-8f49-9339df976f66           145    84     55      2
#>   4: ec15d95a-e23c-4ba5-8280-63019e7ce553           330    82    240      0
#>   5: ad910789-d6b2-4179-9c38-9e95149d7b56           334    81    244     14
#>  ---                                                                       
#> 257: 5b304433-6dae-4938-9a15-5816e18f55df           347    82    257      4
#> 258: fdde53fa-f8e2-4b06-9c93-9b05e538a8da           348    88    258      9
#> 259: 3ae2760c-136b-4cb4-bc37-95c852642185           325    82    235     12
#> 260: 2810a725-9eee-47d7-9c97-5b5812092240           314    73    224      1
#> 261: e9b4bca6-37d7-4a2b-8833-ddc711da0a79           320    82    230     14
#>      trend associated planar_type quality unix_timestamp  notes
#>      <num>     <lgcl>      <char>  <char>          <num> <char>
#>   1:    62       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.665089e+12   <NA>
#>   2:    67       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.665089e+12   <NA>
#>   3:   235       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.665089e+12   <NA>
#>   4:    60       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.665089e+12   <NA>
#>   5:   246       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.665089e+12   <NA>
#>  ---                                                           
#> 257:    76       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.721835e+12   <NA>
#> 258:    78       TRUE        <NA>       4   1.721928e+12   <NA>
#> 259:   237       TRUE        <NA>       4   1.721928e+12   <NA>
#> 260:    44       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.721928e+12   <NA>
#> 261:   232       TRUE        <NA>       5   1.721930e+12   <NA>
#>      modified_timestamp          spot        spot_id feature_type
#>                   <num>        <char>         <char>       <char>
#>   1:                 NA 22-TS-Moss-02 16650869118218    foliation
#>   2:                 NA 22-TS-Moss-02 16650869118218    foliation
#>   3:                 NA 22-TS-Moss-02 16650869118218    foliation
#>   4:                 NA 22-TS-Moss-02 16650869118218    foliation
#>   5:                 NA 22-TS-Moss-02 16650869118218    foliation
#>  ---                                                             
#> 257:                 NA        24TS-2 17218339990191    foliation
#> 258:                 NA       24TS-16 17219277194544    foliation
#> 259:                 NA       24TS-16 17219277194544    foliation
#> 260:                 NA       24TS-16 17219277194544    foliation
#> 261:                 NA       24TS-17 17219297078328    foliation
#>      foliation_type         label contact_type fault_or_sz_type bedding_type
#>              <char>        <char>       <char>           <char>       <char>
#>   1:       cleavage foliation 242         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   2:       cleavage foliation 247         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   3:       cleavage  foliation 55         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   4:       cleavage foliation 240         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>   5:       cleavage foliation 244         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>  ---                                                                        
#> 257:           <NA>          <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 258:           <NA>          <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 259:           <NA>          <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 260:           <NA>          <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#> 261:           <NA>          <NA>         <NA>             <NA>         <NA>
#>      vein_fill directional_indicators vein_type other_vein_fill
#>         <char>                 <char>    <char>          <char>
#>   1:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   2:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   3:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   4:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>   5:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>  ---                                                           
#> 257:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 258:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#> 259:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>

#> 261:      <NA>                   <NA>      <NA>            <NA>
#>      foliation_defined_by movement other_feature fracture_type
#>                    <char>   <char>        <char>        <char>
#>   1:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   2:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   3:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   4:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>   5:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>  ---                                                          
#> 257:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 258:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 259:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 260:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#> 261:                 <NA>     <NA>          <NA>          <NA>
#>      movement_justification        linear_type linear_quality linear_notes
#>                      <char>             <char>         <char>       <char>
#>   1:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>   2:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>   3:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>   4:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>   5:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>  ---                                                                      
#> 257:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#> 258:                   <NA> linear_orientation              4         <NA>
#> 259:                   <NA> linear_orientation              4         <NA>
#> 260:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#> 261:                   <NA> linear_orientation              5         <NA>
#>      linear_feature_type linear_defined_by   linear_label               type
#>                   <char>            <char>         <char>             <char>
#>   1:          stretching              <NA>  stretching 62 planar_orientation
#>   2:          stretching              <NA>  stretching 67 planar_orientation
#>   3:          stretching              <NA> stretching 235 planar_orientation
#>   4:          stretching              <NA>  stretching 60 planar_orientation
#>   5:          stretching              <NA> stretching 246 planar_orientation
#>  ---                                                                        
#> 257:       mineral_align              <NA>           <NA> planar_orientation
#> 258:       mineral_align              <NA>           <NA> planar_orientation

#> 260:       mineral_align              <NA>           <NA> planar_orientation

#>                      <num>                               <char>     <char>
#>   1:          1.665089e+12 50b1dbef-5d64-4a8c-b427-7b1bb8c6053e       <NA>
#>   2:          1.665089e+12 af52e337-9c6b-4392-9f75-eb2dea09e016       <NA>
